positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a friendly cosmic raccoon navigating a celestial urban landscape. The raccoon is depicted with a confident, gentle expression, wearing a tiny astronaut helmet. The scene features oversized, bioluminescent futuristic mushrooms, floating geometric planets, and stylized, crescent-moon inspired skyscrapers forming the backdrop. Use a deep indigo, sapphire blue, and ethereal teal color palette, contrasted sharply with neon yellow and soft cream accents. The overall style should be retro-futuristic and highly graphic, emphasizing strong black outlines and clean silhouette shapes, suitable for screen printing. Central composition, high contrast, vector art feel, excellent depth and clean separation between elements.
negative: blur, grainy, watermark, text, logo, poorly rendered hands, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, photorealistic, 3d render, oil paint, sketch, copyright, celebrity, signature
